title: Knowledge Layer Configuration
description: Configuration for how knowledge layers are handled at runtime. DESIGN NOTE: The 'layer' field defines DEFAULT injection behavior. An agent's knowledge_requirements lists can OVERRIDE this (e.g., placing a role_specific entry in must_know[] to always inject). The entry's applicable_to field controls SCOPE (who can reference it), independent of injection strategy.

total_prompt_budget_tokens.description: Total token budget for knowledge in system prompts (constitution + must_know)

lookup_result_max_tokens.description: Maximum tokens to return from a single lookup query

^_.description: Properties starting with _ are reserved for documentation/comments

max_tokens.description: Maximum tokens from this layer in system prompt

retrieval_tool.description: For on_demand/explicit_query layers, the tool name for retrieval

cache_duration_seconds.description: How long retrieved knowledge is cached in context
